name: my-stroke-of-insight-a-brain-scientists-personal-journey
description: Jill Bolte Taylor's account of experiencing a massive stroke and observing her own cognitive decline — a Harvard neuroanatomist's journey through brain injury, recovery, and the discovery of inner peace.
useCase: Understand stroke, left-right brain function, and how inner peace is accessible through shifting consciousness.
knownRisks: Some readers may find descriptions of brain injury distressing
Stroke experiences vary widely; Taylor's is one of many
Not medical advice — always consult a doctor for stroke symptoms
